title: Nursery Rhyme. CLXIII. Songs.
content:
As I was going up the hill,
            I met with Jack the piper,
        And all the tunes that he could play
            Was "Tie up your petticoats tighter."

        I tied them once, I tied them twice,
            I tied them three times over;
        And all the songs that he could sing
            Was "Carry me safe to Dover."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CLXIII. Songs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
